headline: Strategic angle — ESG narrative differentiation via proactive disclosure and transition planning
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, CDP, TCFD triggered; non-disclosure risks SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
Widening ESG score gap vs. renewable-focused peers; risk of index exclusion if fossil fuel exposure rises.
Potential local community opposition; reputational impact among talent and consumers increasingly sensitive to climate issues.
